title: auto-dao session state
description: Authoritative session state for a learning session. All other Markdown status files are derived views.

source_path.description: Path to the original learning material

processed_path.description: Path to the Markdown-converted material (empty if source is already Markdown)

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source file, used to detect material changes

current_lesson.description: Next lesson to generate or current lesson in progress

total_lessons.description: Planned total number of lessons from roadmap

last_completed_lesson.description: Index of the last fully graded lesson

mastery_passed.description: Cumulative count of correctly answered questions

mastery_failed.description: Cumulative count of incorrectly answered questions

counterfactual_mode.description: Counterfactual reasoning mode. null = not yet decided (will prompt user)

learning_language.description: ISO 639-1 code for the teaching language, e.g. 'zh', 'en'. Empty = same as material language

wait_reason.description: Why the session is blocked, null when not blocked

repo_commit_hash.description: Git commit hash of the repository at learning time. Used for incremental learning on revisit. null for non-repo sources.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last state update
